rationale: The citing paper references Jap and Ganesan (2000) only in a boundary-setting footnote, where it is listed as an example of a hybrid/long-term relationship form between markets and hierarchies. The citation is grouped with other references and used to distinguish the partially integrated channel concept from alternative governance structures. The paper does not develop hypotheses from this specific study, reuse its measures or methods, or engage its life-cycle/control mechanism findings directly.
